notes: v0.19.5 — AUDIO-REACTIVE BG + BROADCAST PvP HUD. The previously-black area outside the arena now has drifting bokeh + a 56-band EQ ribbon along the bottom, all pulsing to the kick/bass/rms of whatever track is playing. Applied to every match mode. PvP also gets a broadcast-style HUD on top: avatar tiles + names + HP bars, central score X:Y, match timer counting down the track length, kill feed on the right, track + BPM tile on the bottom-left.
